reviews.comment:
Buena atención!! Baños limpios!! Espacio verde , mesitas y bancas de cemento bajo los árboles, ideal para estirar las piernas y tomar unos mates, si tenes ganas de algo bien rico, casi enfrente, el parador de checho, después me contas!!!

(Translated by Google)
Great service!! Clean bathrooms!! Green space, cement tables and benches under the trees, ideal for stretching your legs and having some mate. If you're in the mood for something really tasty, Checho's beach bar is almost across the street. Let me know what you think!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aGZlNU9BEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar se encuentra limpio, la  atención muy buena, a pesar de la pandemia y el horario que pasamos. Lo malo: el estado de la RP 5, desde el límite de la Rioja hasta el cruce de la 60. No está señalizado ni las líneas pintadas.

(Translated by Google)
The place is clean, and the service is very good, despite the pandemic and the hours we were in. The downside: the state of Highway 5, from the border with La Rioja to the intersection with Highway 60. It's not marked, nor are the lines painted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2eXBDQ3RnRRAB
